expectations.text: The project uses Java version 25 and Spring Boot version 4.1.0 or higher in pom.xml.
expectations.evidence: pom.xml is configured with Spring Boot parent version 4.1.0 and <java.version>25</java.version>.

expectations.text: Maven Wrapper files (.mvn directory, mvnw, and mvnw.cmd) exist in the root of the project.
expectations.evidence: Root directory includes the .mvn folder, mvnw and mvnw.cmd executable scripts.

expectations.text: The project uses application.properties for configuration, and no application.yml or application.yaml files are present.
expectations.evidence: application.properties exists in src/main/resources/ with database configurations. No application.yml or application.yaml is present.

expectations.text: The UserDto is defined as a record and does not contain sensitive fields (password, createdAt, updatedAt, createAt, updateAt).
expectations.evidence: UserDto.java defines UserDto as a record with fields 'id', 'username', and 'email'. Sensitive fields (password, createdAt, updatedAt) are omitted.

expectations.text: The UserRepository is an interface that extends JpaRepository.
expectations.evidence: UserRepository.java defines an interface extending JpaRepository<User, Long>.

expectations.text: A UserMapper class exists to explicitly map between User entity and UserDto in both directions.
expectations.evidence: UserMapper.java contains entityToDto(User) and dtoToEntity(UserDto) mapping methods.

expectations.text: UserController delegates to UserService, and only exposes REST endpoints returning DTO records.
expectations.evidence: UserController.java is a RestController with endpoints delegating to UserService and returning ResponseEntity<UserDto> or List<UserDto>.
